assertions.reason: Using the reusable Google session in browser session 94dea2e57bb3__starter, the app reached the signed-in starter-sheet step, created a new spreadsheet, persisted the new sheet ID locally, and an authenticated in-browser readback of Pipeline!A1:T1 returned the exact 20-column starter header contract through Logo URL.

interactiveChecks.action: Saved the OAuth client ID in Settings and clicked Log in with Google from the no-sheet flow.
interactiveChecks.observed: Google account chooser opened, the existing emilio3435@gmail.com account was reusable, and the app returned to a signed-in setup state showing Create blank starter sheet.

interactiveChecks.action: Clicked Create blank starter sheet from the signed-in setup state.
interactiveChecks.observed: A new Google Sheets tab opened at docs.google.com for spreadsheet 14LLAWMQvrAqsKxanfG2VOgrYOroDrUszAuY_Bew3hbY and app local storage persisted that sheet ID.

interactiveChecks.action: Read back Pipeline!A1:T1 through an authenticated in-browser fetch after creation.
interactiveChecks.observed: Returned headers were Date Found, Title, Company, Location, Link, Source, Salary, Fit Score, Priority, Tags, Fit Assessment, Contact, Status, Applied Date, Notes, Follow-up Date, Talking Points, Last contact, Did they reply?, Logo URL.

assertions.reason: After starter-sheet creation completed, the app returned to the signed-in dashboard shell, preserved the new sheet link, opened the created Google Sheet in a new tab, and automatically launched the discovery setup wizard with discovery runtime entryPoint starter_sheet_created.

interactiveChecks.action: Returned to the app tab after the starter sheet was created.
interactiveChecks.observed: The dashboard shell was visible with signed-in account controls, Open Google Sheet, Run discovery, and the discovery setup wizard already open.

interactiveChecks.action: Inspected the live discovery wizard runtime after creation.
interactiveChecks.observed: getDiscoveryWizardRuntime().entryPoint returned starter_sheet_created and the wizard state was active on the bootstrap handoff path.
A new Google Sheets tab stayed open for the created spreadsheet while the app remained on the dashboard/discovery surface instead of stranding the user between setup screens.

frictions: Selecting the reusable Google account closed the Google account chooser and shifted focus to the newly active Google Sheets tab, so I manually returned to the app tab to continue the validation.

agent-browser's network request log did not retain the Google Sheets create/write calls for this run, so I verified them via in-page performance resource entries plus an authenticated in-browser readback of Pipeline!A1:T1.
notes: No cookie-import flow was used; the existing reusable Google session already present in session 94dea2e57bb3__starter was sufficient.
Post-flow console and page errors were empty on the app tab after clearing logs and rechecking the settled dashboard state.

Observed Google Sheets resource entries included https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets and https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets/14LLAWMQvrAqsKxanfG2VOgrYOroDrUszAuY_Bew3hbY/values/Pipeline!A1%3AT1?valueInputOption=RAW.
